description: Issue a signed attestation for a community member. Stored in the community's ATProto repo.

main.description: Create an attestation record certifying a member's role, status, or credentials.

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Subject is not a member of this community.

communityDid.description: The community DID issuing the attestation.

subjectDid.description: The DID of the person being attested.

type.description: Attestation type: membership, role, or credential.

claim.description: Arbitrary claim data (role, position, status, etc.).
